MaxLineLength:AlarmRearm.kt$AlarmRearm$"Alarm send failed after several tries — long-press ALARM to wake the watch, then tap Retry in the notification"

MaxLineLength:ErrorNotifier.kt$ErrorNotifier$FailureKind.ALARM_UNREACHABLE -> "Couldn't push your next alarm to the watch after several tries — it won't ring until this succeeds. Long-press the ALARM button to wake the watch, then tap Retry."

MaxLineLength:ErrorNotifier.kt$ErrorNotifier$FailureKind.SUN_UNREACHABLE -> "Couldn't deliver the next sunrise/sunset after several tries. Long-press the ALARM button to wake your watch, then tap Retry."
MaxLineLength:ErrorNotifier.kt$ErrorNotifier$FailureKind.WATCH_UNREACHABLE -> "Couldn't reach your watch after several tries. Long-press the ALARM button to wake its Bluetooth, then tap Retry."
MaxLineLength:HomeScreen.kt$is PreviewState.WaitingForCoords -> Text("Waiting for coordinates…", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium)
MaxLineLength:Prefs.kt$Prefs$set(value) = if (value == null) settings.remove(KEY_CUSTOM_SENT_MS) else settings.putLong(KEY_CUSTOM_SENT_MS, value)
MaxLineLength:Prefs.kt$Prefs$set(value) = if (value == null) settings.remove(KEY_LAST_NOTIFIED_KIND) else settings.putString(KEY_LAST_NOTIFIED_KIND, value.name)
MaxLineLength:Prefs.kt$Prefs$set(value) = if (value == null) settings.remove(KEY_LAST_SEND_SUMMARY) else settings.putString(KEY_LAST_SEND_SUMMARY, value)
MaxLineLength:Prefs.kt$Prefs$set(value) = if (value == null) settings.remove(KEY_LOCATION_FETCHED_MS) else settings.putLong(KEY_LOCATION_FETCHED_MS, value)
MaxLineLength:Prefs.kt$Prefs$set(value) = if (value == null) settings.remove(KEY_STEPS_FETCHED_MS) else settings.putLong(KEY_STEPS_FETCHED_MS, value)
MaxLineLength:Prefs.kt$Prefs$set(value) = if (value == null) settings.remove(KEY_TEMP_CACHE_UNIT) else settings.putString(KEY_TEMP_CACHE_UNIT, value.name)
MaxLineLength:Prefs.kt$Prefs$set(value) = if (value == null) settings.remove(KEY_TEMP_FETCHED_MS) else settings.putLong(KEY_TEMP_FETCHED_MS, value)
MaxLineLength:Prefs.kt$Prefs$set(value) = if (value == null) settings.remove(KEY_TEMP_VALUE) else settings.putFloat(KEY_TEMP_VALUE, value.toFloat())
MultiLineIfElse:ConnectionStatus.kt$"Wake the watch: long-press ALARM or triple-tap the Clock face, then tap Reconnect."

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:WatchLink.kt$WatchLink.HeldCallback$// Written under [lock] in writeHeld, read/incremented from the (serialized) GATT callback // thread in onCharacteristicWrite — @Volatile makes those cross-thread reads well-defined. @Volatile var writeChunks: List<ByteArray> = emptyList()
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:OlleeProtocol.kt$OlleeProtocol$/** Allowed autosleep_period values (seconds), from the official app's picker. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:OlleeProtocol.kt$OlleeProtocol$/** Bit position within the big-endian bitmask word. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:OlleeProtocol.kt$OlleeProtocol$// Experimental: the Temperature face's field. The official app *reads* it at 0x2E
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:Prefs.kt$Prefs.Companion$/** Legacy `active_face` value from when notifications was a mutually-exclusive face. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:WatchLink.kt$WatchLink$// ATT payload for the watch's default 23-byte MTU (MTU - 3). Longer frames are fragmented across
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:WatchLink.kt$WatchLink$// The Android GATT stack allows one outstanding op; a read-request write can be transiently
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:WatchLink.kt$WatchLink.HeldCallback$// Written under [lock] in writeHeld, read/incremented from the (serialized) GATT callback
ThrowsCount:OpenMeteoClient.kt$OpenMeteoClient$private suspend fun fetchOnce(lat: Double, lng: Double, unit: TempUnit): Double
Wrapping:ComplicationController.kt$ComplicationController$it.copy( lat = lat.toString(), lng = lng.toString(), locating = false, locationLabel = locLabel(lat, lng), locationFreshness = "just now", )
Wrapping:ComplicationController.kt$ComplicationController$it.copy( locating = false, locationFreshness = (freshnessLabel(prefs.lastLocationFetchedMs, nowMs()) ?: "stale") + " · refresh failed", )

Wrapping:ComplicationController.kt$ComplicationController$it.copy( notificationCount = prefs.notificationCount, notificationAccessGranted = notificationAccess.isGranted(), notificationsEnabled = prefs.notificationsEnabled, )
Wrapping:ComplicationController.kt$ComplicationController$it.copy( stepsHealthGranted = false, stepsPreview = PreviewState.Error("Grant Health access to read steps"), )
Wrapping:ComplicationController.kt$ComplicationController$it.copy( stepsPreview = PreviewState.Error("Couldn't read steps from Health Connect"), )

Wrapping:ComplicationController.kt$ComplicationController$it.copy( stepsPreview = PreviewState.Ready(payload, stepsHuman(cached) + " (stale)"), stepsUpdated = prefs.stepsFetchedMs?.let { ms -> "Updated ${clockTime(ms)}" }, )

Wrapping:ComplicationController.kt$ComplicationController$it.copy( sunPreview = PreviewState.Ready(payload, "$kindLabel at $pretty"), sunUpdated = "Updated ${clockTime(nowMs())}", sunNext = "Next: $kindLabel at $pretty", )

Wrapping:ComplicationController.kt$ComplicationController$it.copy( tempPreview = PreviewState.Ready(payload, human), tempUpdated = "Updated ${clockTime(prefs.tempFetchedMs!!)}", tempNext = tempNextText(), )
Wrapping:ComplicationController.kt$ComplicationController$it.copy( tempPreview = PreviewState.Ready(payload, human), tempUpdated = prefs.tempFetchedMs?.let { ms -> "Updated ${clockTime(ms)}" }, )

Wrapping:TimerSetsJson.kt$TimerSetsJson$("slots", buildJsonArray { for (slot in set.slots) add(buildJsonObject { put("label", JsonPrimitive(slot.label)) put("dur", JsonPrimitive(slot.durationSeconds)) }) })
